label: Strategy Fabric Status
description: Check whether strategy slots are using the shared market-data fabric and whether Polymarket/Binance inputs are fresh.

interface.command: node scripts/strategy-harness.mjs fabric-status --round-dir <round-dir> --worker-status <worker-status> --worker-source polymarket --worker-source binance --coin BTC

inputs.name: round-dir
inputs.description: Path to the live round being reviewed.

inputs.name: worker-status
inputs.description: File or URL for Worker fabric status.

outputs.name: fabric_gate
outputs.description: Shared-input gate, upstream connection counts, freshness, consumer lag, and direct-WS caveats.

failureModes.description: Strategy slots still consume direct upstream WebSockets instead of the fabric.
Polymarket or Binance freshness exceeds the strategy decision budget.

evidencePolicy: Fabric health is promotion-blocking when same-input parity is required.
Worker health alone does not prove strategy consumers are migrated.
Current BTC S1 strategy evidence uses Polymarket and Binance, not Chainlink.
notes: Use this before attributing missed trades to strategy logic.
